rationale: Educ. Code §44.0051 governs posting of adopted school-district budgets on district websites. Increasing the homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b) does not alter any budget-posting requirement or procedure.
quote: On final approval of the budget by the board of trustees, the school district shall post on the district's Internet website a copy of the budget adopted by the board of trustees.
_note: No textual or operational conflict between the proposed homestead-exemption increase and this budget-posting statute.
